label: Layout prefab parms
description: Parameters for placing prefabs inside a room. The element name is the PrefabDef defName (the 'def' field).

def.label: Prefab
def.description: PrefabDef to place. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

countRange.label: Count range
countRange.description: Fixed placement count range. Uses IntRange.Invalid to derive count from countPerHundredCells or countPerTenEdgeCells.

minMaxRange.label: Min max range
minMaxRange.description: Minimum and maximum allowed placement count. -1 lower bound means no minimum.

ensureNoBlocks.label: Ensure no blocks
ensureNoBlocks.description: When true, placement positions that would block room access are rejected.

countPerHundredCells.label: Count per hundred cells
countPerHundredCells.description: Random range for how many placements appear per 100 room cells.

countPerTenEdgeCells.label: Count per ten edge cells
countPerTenEdgeCells.description: Random range for how many placements appear per 10 edge cells.
